title: Why McCormick Stock Was Up This Week
text: McCormick is seeing faster sales growth into early 2023. Gross profit margin declines appear to be ending, with a rebound likely ahead.

title: 8 Defensive Dividend Stars That Could Help You Retire Rich
text: Most people are far behind on their retirement goals - often without realizing it. In this article, I present conservative dividend growth investing as a suitable way to achieve long-term financial goals with subdued risks (getting rich slowly).

title: McCormick Roars After Earnings
text: Up until Tuesday, shares of spice and seasoning maker McCormick and Co. Inc. ( MKC , Financial) had endured a very difficult year, with the stock losing almost 27%. The double whammy of inflationary pressures and currency exchange had weighed on the company's results for some time.

title: Rallies from Walgreens, PVH and McCormick could be a good sign for earnings season, Cramer says
text: Stocks that rallied Tuesday in response to "less than stellar" quarterly reports could bode well for earnings season, CNBC's Jim Cramer said.

title: 7 Dividend Aristocrats to Buy for Consistent Income Growth
text: I'd argue there's never been a better time to consider investing in dividend aristocrats. Volatility remains very high in the overall market, with a destabilized banking sector.

title: McCormick (MKC) Q1 Earnings Top Estimates, Sales Increase Y/Y
text: McCormick's (MKC) first-quarter fiscal 2023 results reflect gains from higher pricing along with the impacts of the Kitchen Basics divestiture, pandemic-led reduced consumption in China and cost inflation.

title: Why McCormick Stock Soared Tuesday
text: McCormick reaffirmed 2023 guidance after a strong quarter. A business model balancing consumer and commercial customers has helped the company.

title: The Bottom Is In For McCormick & Company
text: If you have doubts about the meaning of McCormick's (NYSE: MKC) Q1 results, look no further than the price action chart. The stock price is up more than 10% on the news and indicating a bottom for this market.

title: McCormick (MKC) Tops Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: McCormick (MKC) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 20.41% and 1.33%, respectively, for the quarter ended February 2023. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: McCormick stock rises after profit beats expectations and sales rise to a record, with price increases helping offset volume declines
text: Shares of McCormick & Co. Inc. MKC, +1.63% rose 1.3% in premarket trading Tuesday, after the flavor and spices company reported fiscal first-quarter profit that declined but beat expectations, as sales rose to a record amid strength in the flavor business and as pricing increases offset a decline in volume. Net income for the quarter to Feb. 28 fell to $139.1 million, or 52 cents a share, from $154.9 million, or 57 cents a share, in the year-ago period.

title: Factors to Note as McCormick (MKC) Readies for Q1 Earnings
text: McCormick's (MKC) first-quarter results are likely to reflect gains from pricing, strong brands and the Comprehensive Continuous Improvement program amid cost headwinds.

title: 10 Biggest Companies Reporting Earnings in the Fifth Week of March 2023
text: Buying stocks before the earnings announcement is tricky, and there are several reasons for that.

title: Exclusive: McCormick's iconic red-cap bottles are getting a makeover
text: McCormick, the top-selling maker of seasonings and spices, is giving its iconic red-cap bottles their first makeover in more than 40 years.

title: McCormick (MKC) Down More Than 15% in 3 Months: Here's Why
text: McCormick (MKC) is battling escalated cost inflation and supply-chain expenses, which are denting its gross margin.
